message:
test(fixtures): migrate mock-* to fixture-* naming and add provenance hashes

- Renamed 'mock-claude' to 'fixture-claude' in connector_claude.rs and
  fs_errors.rs following the no-mock policy
- Added SHA256 hashes for all connector fixtures in MANIFEST.json
- Added entries for codex, cline, gemini, amp, pi_agent, and opencode
  fixtures with provenance metadata

Part of bd-1dfc: P6.14h connector fixtures from real sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
